Notice Of Motion To Compel Physical Examination Of Pltf And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: HEIDI MACHEN, ESQ., 415.626.1140, FOR PLAINTIFF BEVERLY BERNELL MYRES.
COLIN H. JEWELL, ESQ., 650.871.9544, FOR DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY Motion To Compel Physical Examination Of Plaintiff And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff IS Granted, for good cause shown. Plaintiff has alleged "physical harm," and "serious harm to her already injured knee." (See, e.g., Complaint at 17, 25.) Plaintiff's physical condition is a basis for this action. The requested physical examination, limited in scope to approximately one hour, outweighs Plaintiff's privacy interest and is necessary for a fair resolution of the lawsuit. The examination must occur within 10 days, unless the parties mutually agree otherwise. Monetary sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
